[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up shows a light-colored cat with its mouth open, appearing to meow or vocalize while facing the camera at very close range.

The main subject is a cat with a pale gray-and-white coat, visible tabby markings, and upright ears. Its mouth is open wide with the tongue visible, and its eyes appear partially closed or squinting. The cat’s head fills most of the frame, with only part of its body and neck visible.

The setting appears to be indoors, but the background is unclear due to the tight crop and soft blur. The lighting looks dim and warm, with a shallow depth of field that keeps the cat’s face dominant while the surroundings fade into indistinct shapes.

The visible colors are mainly light gray, white, and muted warm tones in the background. The image is slightly blurred and shaky, suggesting it was taken close up and quickly, with the camera angled straight toward the cat’s face.

No important visible text detected.

This image shows a very close, slightly blurry view of a light-colored cat with its mouth open and tongue out. The background is indistinct, indicating an indoor setting with the cat as the clear focal point.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
